title: callicarpa ferruginea
intro: Callicarpa ferruginea, also known as the rusty bellflower or velvet bellflower, is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Callicarpa ferruginea include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. Callicarpa ferruginea can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a valuable addition to holistic remedies.
